$comment: list-archetype screenshot traversal + Tier-2 outcome assertions. Generates qa/flows/mobile.yaml (scripts/qa/compile-flow.mjs); never hand-edit the yaml. Anchors live in qa/selectors.json and target the seeded 'Weekend plan' list (src/qa/fixtures.ts). The add-item assertion pins the core action: an item absent before the add is visible after it (assertNot -> assert).
